properties.displayName: Subnets should have a Network Security Group
properties.description: Deny the creation or update of a subnet that does not have a Network Security Group associated. AzureFirewallSubnet, AzureBastionSubnet, and GatewaySubnet are excluded because Azure does not support NSGs on those subnets.

metadata.description: The effect determines what happens when the policy rule is evaluated to match. Deny prevents creation; Audit logs a non-compliant event without blocking.
